message:
style: rustfmt pass on 13 core modules

Import reordering, line-width normalization, brace positioning, and
chained-call formatting across compact_bitset, cooldown_tracker,
edit_distance, persistent_ds, recorder_audit, recorder_invariants,
recorder_migration, recorder_storage, shortest_path, sliding_window,
storage_telemetry, tantivy_ingest, tantivy_reindex.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
